Package org.mitre.synthea.world.agents

Class Person

java.lang.Object
org.mitre.synthea.world.agents.Person
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable, RandomNumberGenerator, QuadTreeElement
public class Person extends Object implements Serializable, RandomNumberGenerator, QuadTreeElement
Represents a person in the simulation.
See Also:
  • Serialized Form

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    addCurrentProvider(String context, Provider provider)
    Set the current provider to be the supplied provider.
    void
    addressLargestSymptom()
    Mark the largest valued symptom as addressed.
    Period
    age(long time)
    Returns a person's age in Period form.
    double
    ageInDecimalYears(long time)
    Returns a person's age in decimal years.
    int
    ageInMonths(long time)
    Return the persons age in months at a given time.
    int
    ageInYears(long time)
    Returns the persons age in years at the given time.
    boolean
    alive(long time)
    Returns whether a person is alive at the given time.
    boolean
    canAffordPlan(InsurancePlan plan)
    Returns whether or not a person can afford a given payer.
    void
    checkToPayMonthlyPremium(long time)
    Checks if the person has paid their monthly premium.
    HealthRecord.Encounter
    encounterStart(long time, HealthRecord.EncounterType type)
    Start an encounter for the current provider.
    long
    getCount()
    Returns the number of times this random number generator has been called.
    String
    getCurrentEncounterModule()
    Get the module with the current encounter or null if no module is currently in an encounter.
    Provider
    getCurrentProvider(String module)
    Get the current provider for the specified module.
    double
    getDalys()
    Returns the sum of DALYS of this person's life.
    Map<String,ExpressedSymptom>
    getExpressedSymptoms()
    Gets the expressed symptoms of the person.
    HealthRecord
    getHealthRecord(Provider provider, long time)
    Returns the current HealthRecord based on the provider.
    Point2D.Double
    getLonLat()
    Returns the geographic coordinates of the person.
    ExpressedConditionRecord
    getOnsetConditionRecord()
    Gets the onset condition record of the person.
    Provider
    getProvider(HealthRecord.EncounterType type, long time)
    Get the preferred provider for the specified encounter type.
    double
    getQalys()
    Returns the sum of QALYS of this person's life.
    double
    getQolsForYear(int year)
    Returns the person's QOL at the given time.
    long
    getSeed()
    Returns the seed value used by this random number generator.
    int
    getSymptom(String type)
    Method for retrieving the value associated to a given symptom.
    Long
    getSymptomLastUpdatedTime(String module, String symptom)
    Method for retrieving the last time a given symptom has been updated from a given module.
    List<String>
    getSymptoms()
    Get active symptoms above some threshold.
    Double
    getVitalSign(org.mitre.synthea.world.concepts.VitalSign vitalSign, long time)
    Get a vital sign value.
    double
    getX()
    Get the x-coordinate of this element.
    double
    getY()
    Get the y-coordinate of this element.
    boolean
    hadPriorState(String name)
    Check for prior existence of specified state.
    boolean
    hadPriorState(String name, String since, Long within)
    Check for prior existence of specified state.
    boolean
    hasCurrentEncounter()
    Check if there is a current encounter.
    void
    initializeDefaultHealthRecords()
    Initializes person's default health records.

    providerCount()
    Gets the count of providers associated with the person.

    Returns a random double.

    Returns a random boolean.
    double

    Returns a double from a normal distribution.
    int

    Returns a random integer.

    Returns a random integer in the given bound.

    randLong()
    Return a random long.

    randUUID()
    Return a random UUID.

    Releases the current encounter reservation.

    Remove the current provider for the specified module.
    boolean
    reserveCurrentEncounter(long time, String module)
    Reserve the current Encounter...
    void
    setProvider(HealthRecord.EncounterType type, long time)
    Set the preferred provider for the specified encounter type to be the provider at the specified time.

    setProvider(HealthRecord.EncounterType type, Provider provider)
    Set the preferred provider for the specified encounter type.

    setSymptom(String module, String cause, String type, long time, int value, Boolean addressed)
    Updating the method for accounting of the time on which the symptom is set.

    setVitalSign(org.mitre.synthea.world.concepts.VitalSign vitalSign, double value)
    Convenience function to set a vital sign to a constant value.

    setVitalSign(org.mitre.synthea.world.concepts.VitalSign vitalSign, ValueGenerator valueGenerator)
    Set a vital sign's value generator.

    symptomTotal()
    The total number of all unaddressed symptom severities.

      public Map<org.mitre.synthea.world.concepts.VitalSign,ValueGenerator> vitalSigns
      Map of vital signs to their value generators.

    • onsetConditionRecord

      public ExpressedConditionRecord onsetConditionRecord
      Data structure for storing onset conditions (init_time, end_time).

    • chronicMedications

      public Map<String,HealthRecord.Medication> chronicMedications
      Map of chronic medications for the person.

    • record

      public HealthRecord record
      The active health record.

    • defaultRecord

      public HealthRecord defaultRecord
      Default health record. If "lossOfCareEnabled" is true, this is also the record with entries that were covered by insurance.

    • lossOfCareRecord

      public HealthRecord lossOfCareRecord
      Only used if "lossOfCareEnabled" is true. In that case, this health record contains entries that should have, but did not, occur.

    • lossOfCareEnabled

      public boolean lossOfCareEnabled
      Experimental feature flag. When "lossOfCareEnabled" is true, patients can miss care due to cost or lack of health insurance coverage.

    • records

      public Map<String,HealthRecord> records
      Individual provider health records (if "hasMultipleRecords" is enabled).

    • hasMultipleRecords

      public boolean hasMultipleRecords
      Flag that enables each provider having a different health record for each patient. In other words, the patients entire record is split across provider systems.

    • history

      public List<State> history
      History of the currently active module.

    • coverage

      public final CoverageRecord coverage
      Record of insurance coverage.

    • CURRENT_ENCOUNTER_MODULE

      public static final String CURRENT_ENCOUNTER_MODULE
      Key for tracking the current encounter module.
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • CURRENTPROVIDER

      public static final String CURRENTPROVIDER
      The current provider key
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • PREFERREDYPROVIDER

      public static final String PREFERREDYPROVIDER
      The preferred provider key
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

  • Constructor Details

    • Person

      public Person(long seed)
      Person constructor.
      Parameters:
      seed - the seed for random number generation

  • Method Details

    • initializeDefaultHealthRecords

      public void initializeDefaultHealthRecords()
      Initializes person's default health records. May need to be called if attributes change due to fixed demographics.

    • rand

      public double rand()
      Returns a random double.
      Specified by:
      rand in interface RandomNumberGenerator
      Returns:
      a random double in the range [0.0, 1.0)

    • randBoolean

      public boolean randBoolean()
      Returns a random boolean.
      Specified by:
      randBoolean in interface RandomNumberGenerator
      Returns:
      a random boolean

    • randInt

      public int randInt()
      Returns a random integer.
      Specified by:
      randInt in interface RandomNumberGenerator
      Returns:
      a random integer

    • randInt

      public int randInt(int bound)
      Returns a random integer in the given bound.
      Specified by:
      randInt in interface RandomNumberGenerator
      Parameters:
      bound - the upper bound (exclusive) for the random integer
      Returns:
      a random integer between 0 (inclusive) and bound (exclusive)

    • randGaussian

      public double randGaussian()
      Returns a double from a normal distribution.
      Specified by:
      randGaussian in interface RandomNumberGenerator
      Returns:
      a random double from a standard normal distribution

    • randLong

      public long randLong()
      Return a random long.
      Specified by:
      randLong in interface RandomNumberGenerator
      Returns:
      a random long

    • randUUID

      public UUID randUUID()
      Return a random UUID.
      Specified by:
      randUUID in interface RandomNumberGenerator
      Returns:
      a random UUID

    • getCount

      public long getCount()
      Description copied from interface: RandomNumberGenerator
      Returns the number of times this random number generator has been called.
      Specified by:
      getCount in interface RandomNumberGenerator
      Returns:
      the count of random number generation calls

    • getSeed

      public long getSeed()
      Description copied from interface: RandomNumberGenerator
      Returns the seed value used by this random number generator.
      Specified by:
      getSeed in interface RandomNumberGenerator
      Returns:
      the seed value

    • age

      public Period age(long time)
      Returns a person's age in Period form.
      Parameters:
      time - The time at which to calculate the age.
      Returns:
      The age of the person as a Period.

    • ageInDecimalYears

      public double ageInDecimalYears(long time)
      Returns a person's age in decimal years. (ex. 7.5 ~ 7 years 6 months old)
      Parameters:
      time - The time when their age should be calculated.
      Returns:
      decimal age in years

    • ageInMonths

      public int ageInMonths(long time)
      Return the persons age in months at a given time.
      Parameters:
      time - The time when their age should be calculated.
      Returns:
      age in months. Can never be less than zero, even if given a time before they were born.

    • ageInYears

      public int ageInYears(long time)
      Returns the persons age in years at the given time.
      Parameters:
      time - The time when their age should be calculated.
      Returns:
      age in years. Can never be less than zero, even if given a time before they were born.

    • alive

      public boolean alive(long time)
      Returns whether a person is alive at the given time.
      Parameters:
      time - the current time in milliseconds
      Returns:
      true if the person is alive, false otherwise

    • getExpressedSymptoms

      public Map<String,ExpressedSymptom> getExpressedSymptoms()
      Gets the expressed symptoms of the person.
      Returns:
      a map of symptom names to their expressed symptoms

    • getOnsetConditionRecord

      public ExpressedConditionRecord getOnsetConditionRecord()
      Gets the onset condition record of the person.
      Returns:
      the onset condition record

    • providerCount

      public int providerCount()
      Gets the count of providers associated with the person.
      Returns:
      the number of providers

    • setSymptom

      public void setSymptom(String module, String cause, String type, long time, int value, Boolean addressed)
      Updating the method for accounting of the time on which the symptom is set. Sets a symptom for the person.
      Parameters:
      module - The module that triggered the symptom.
      cause - The cause of the symptom.
      type - The type of symptom.
      time - The time the symptom occurred.
      value - The severity or value of the symptom.
      addressed - Whether the symptom has been addressed.

    • getSymptomLastUpdatedTime

      public Long getSymptomLastUpdatedTime(String module, String symptom)
      Method for retrieving the last time a given symptom has been updated from a given module.
      Parameters:
      module - the module containing the symptom
      symptom - the symptom to check
      Returns:
      the last updated time of the symptom

    • getSymptom

      public int getSymptom(String type)
      Method for retrieving the value associated to a given symptom. This corresponds to the maximum value across all potential causes.
      Parameters:
      type - the symptom type
      Returns:
      the value of the symptom

    • getSymptoms

      public List<String> getSymptoms()
      Get active symptoms above some threshold. TODO These symptoms are not filtered by time.
      Returns:
      list of active symptoms above the threshold.

    • addressLargestSymptom

      public void addressLargestSymptom()
      Mark the largest valued symptom as addressed.

    • getVitalSign

      public Double getVitalSign(org.mitre.synthea.world.concepts.VitalSign vitalSign, long time)
      Get a vital sign value.
      Parameters:
      vitalSign - The vital sign to retrieve.
      time - The time at which to retrieve the vital sign value.
      Returns:
      The value of the vital sign at the specified time.

    • setVitalSign

      public void setVitalSign(org.mitre.synthea.world.concepts.VitalSign vitalSign, ValueGenerator valueGenerator)
      Set a vital sign's value generator.
      Parameters:
      vitalSign - The vital sign to set.
      valueGenerator - The value generator to use for the vital sign.

    • setVitalSign

      public void setVitalSign(org.mitre.synthea.world.concepts.VitalSign vitalSign, double value)
      Convenience function to set a vital sign to a constant value.
      Parameters:
      vitalSign - The vital sign to set.
      value - The constant value to set for the vital sign.

    • recordDeath

      public void recordDeath(long time, HealthRecord.Code cause)
      Records a person's death.
      Parameters:
      time - the time of death.
      cause - the cause of death.

    • symptomTotal

      public int symptomTotal()
      The total number of all unaddressed symptom severities.
      Returns:
      total : sum of all the symptom severities. This number drives care-seeking behaviors.

    • hadPriorState

      public boolean hadPriorState(String name)
      Check for prior existence of specified state.
      Parameters:
      name - The name of the state.
      Returns:
      True if the state exists, false otherwise.

    • hadPriorState

      public boolean hadPriorState(String name, String since, Long within)
      Check for prior existence of specified state.
      Parameters:
      name - The name of the state.
      since - The name of the state which marks a boundary for checking the history
      within - The time within which to check.
      Returns:
      True if the state exists, false otherwise.

    • encounterStart

      public HealthRecord.Encounter encounterStart(long time, HealthRecord.EncounterType type)
      Start an encounter for the current provider.
      Parameters:
      time - The time of the encounter.
      type - The type of encounter.
      Returns:
      The started encounter.

    • getHealthRecord

      public HealthRecord getHealthRecord(Provider provider, long time)
      Returns the current HealthRecord based on the provider. If the person has no more remaining income, Uncovered HealthRecord is returned.
      Parameters:
      provider - the provider of the encounter
      time - the current time (To determine person's current income and payer)
      Returns:
      The health record for the provider.

    • getCurrentEncounterModule

      public String getCurrentEncounterModule()
      Get the module with the current encounter or null if no module is currently in an encounter.
      Returns:
      The module with the current encounter, or null if none.

    • hasCurrentEncounter

      public boolean hasCurrentEncounter()
      Check if there is a current encounter.
      Returns:
      true if there is a current encounter, false otherwise.

    • releaseCurrentEncounter

      public void releaseCurrentEncounter(long time, String module)
      Releases the current encounter reservation. This always succeeds, so any calls should make sure they are the owners using 'getCurrentEncounterModule()'. Currently the parameters are unused.
      Parameters:
      time - The time in the simulation.
      module - The name of the module releasing the reservation.

    • reserveCurrentEncounter

      public boolean reserveCurrentEncounter(long time, String module)
      Reserve the current Encounter... no other module can run an encounter (except for Wellness Encounters).
      Parameters:
      time - The time in the simulation.
      module - The name of the module making the reservation.
      Returns:
      true if the encounter is reserved, false otherwise.

    • getProvider

      public Provider getProvider(HealthRecord.EncounterType type, long time)
      Get the preferred provider for the specified encounter type. If none is set the provider at the specified time as the preferred provider for this encounter type.
      Parameters:
      type - The type of encounter.
      time - The time of the encounter.
      Returns:
      The preferred provider.

    • setProvider

      public void setProvider(HealthRecord.EncounterType type, Provider provider)
      Set the preferred provider for the specified encounter type.
      Parameters:
      type - The type of encounter.
      provider - The provider to set as preferred.

    • setProvider

      public void setProvider(HealthRecord.EncounterType type, long time)
      Set the preferred provider for the specified encounter type to be the provider at the specified time.
      Parameters:
      type - The type of encounter.
      time - The time of the encounter.

    • addCurrentProvider

      public void addCurrentProvider(String context, Provider provider)
      Set the current provider to be the supplied provider.
      Parameters:
      context - The context for the provider.
      provider - The provider to set as current.

    • removeCurrentProvider

      public void removeCurrentProvider(String module)
      Remove the current provider for the specified module.
      Parameters:
      module - The module for which to remove the provider.

    • getCurrentProvider

      public Provider getCurrentProvider(String module)
      Get the current provider for the specified module.
      Parameters:
      module - The module for which to get the provider.
      Returns:
      The current provider for the module.

    • getQalys

      public double getQalys()
      Returns the sum of QALYS of this person's life.
      Returns:
      The sum of QALYS.

    • getDalys

      public double getDalys()
      Returns the sum of DALYS of this person's life.
      Returns:
      The sum of DALYs.

    • canAffordPlan

      public boolean canAffordPlan(InsurancePlan plan)
      Returns whether or not a person can afford a given payer. If a person's income is greater than a year of montlhy premiums + deductible then they can afford the insurance.
      Parameters:
      plan - the plan to check.
      Returns:
      true if the person can afford the plan, false otherwise.

    • checkToPayMonthlyPremium

      public void checkToPayMonthlyPremium(long time)
      Checks if the person has paid their monthly premium. If not, the person pays the premium to their current payer.
      Parameters:
      time - the time that the person checks to pay premium.

    • getQolsForYear

      public double getQolsForYear(int year)
      Returns the person's QOL at the given time.
      Parameters:
      year - The year to get QOL data.
      Returns:
      The QOL for the year.

    • getX

      public double getX()
      Description copied from interface: QuadTreeElement
      Get the x-coordinate of this element.
      Specified by:
      getX in interface QuadTreeElement
      Returns:
      the x-coordinate

    • getY

      public double getY()
      Description copied from interface: QuadTreeElement
      Get the y-coordinate of this element.
      Specified by:
      getY in interface QuadTreeElement
      Returns:
      the y-coordinate

    • getLonLat

      public Point2D.Double getLonLat()
      Returns the geographic coordinates of the person.
      Returns:
      The geographic coordinates.
